message:
test: add 36 unit tests for table theme, terminal state, and undo commands

- table_theme: 12 tests (gradient sampling, StyleMask::all, builder chain,
  diagnostics, spec round-trip, column_gap/row_height validation)
- terminal/state: 13 tests (CellAttrs::set, DirtyRegion mark_rect/mark_all/resize,
  Scrollback overflow/clear, Pen::reset, cursor visibility, ClearRegion variants)
- undo/command: 11 tests (execute/undo callbacks, error paths, target(),
  merge_text, CommandMetadata default, CommandSource default, push_executed)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
